title: Markov — Chain Analysis & Estimation
description: Markov chain analysis: stationary distribution, n-step transition, ergodicity, communicating classes, entropy rate, mean first passage time, and chain estimation from observed data. Pure Rust via stem-math.

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Analyze a Markov chain. Modes: summary, stationary, n_step, classify, classes, ergodicity, entropy, mfpt.

tools.name: from-data
tools.description: Estimate a Markov chain from observed state sequences. Returns transition matrix and stationary distribution.
